## Checklist

- [ ] I understand every line I am submitting and can explain it.
- [ ] I tested the change in **both Vim and Neovim** (noted above).
- [ ] If I used an AI tool, I disclosed the tool and the scope of its use.
- [ ] I did not modify `vendor/`.
- [ ] Any AI-assisted code is not a verbatim copy of third-party work and is MIT-compatible.
